extracts.title: England vs. Croatia Prediction, Odds, Picks For World Cup Match
extracts.short_extract: Bet on a first half draw and under 2.5 goals.
facts: Moneyline listed England -140, Croatia +420, Draw +270.
Total 2.5 listed Over +116, Under -142.
Analyst angle leaned conservative: first-half draw and under 2.5 goals.

extracts.title: World Cup 2026: England vs. Croatia Lineups, Odds
extracts.short_extract: Both teams’ lineups are now set.
facts: Published before the 16:00 ET kickoff.
England listed as -145, Croatia +425, Draw +275.
England XI: Pickford, O'Reilly, Konsa, Stones, James, Anderson, Rice, Bellingham, Gordon, Kane, Madueke.
Croatia XI: Livakovic, Gvardiol, Sutalo, Vuskovic, Stanisic, Modric, Pasalic, Sucic, Perisic, Baturina, Musa.
Saka, Guehi and Rashford were noted as not starting.

extracts.title: England vs Croatia: Lineups, Prediction, Betting Tips & Odds
facts: Reported England won all eight qualifying matches without conceding.
Reported Croatia had seven wins and a draw in qualifying, conceding four goals.
No injuries or suspensions reported for either side.
Predicted England 2-0 Croatia.
